name: Classic Minimalist T-Shirt
description: A premium heavyweight cotton T-shirt designed for comfort and style. Perfect for custom logo printing or unique artistic designs.

name: Urban Oversized Hoodie
description: Stay cozy and stylish with our premium oversized hoodie. Made from a blend of soft fleece and cotton.

name: Custom Embroidered Denim Jacket
description: A timeless classic. Our sturdy denim jacket is ready for your custom embroidery or patch designs.

name: Matte Finish Phone Case
description: Protect your device with style. Our ultra-slim phone case features a premium matte finish.

name: Leather & Felt Laptop Sleeve
description: Elegant protection for your laptop. This sleeve combines premium vegan leather with soft felt.

name: Velvet Touch Throw Pillow
description: Add a touch of luxury to your living space. Our velvet throw pillows are incredibly soft.

name: Abstract Woven Tapestry
description: Transform your walls with a custom woven tapestry. A unique way to display your favorite art.

name: Engraved Oak Cutting Board
description: The perfect household gift. Our solid oak cutting boards can be laser-engraved with names or dates.

name: Handcrafted Leather Journal
description: Capture your thoughts in style. This handcrafted journal features premium leather covers.

name: Metallic Minimalist Desk Organizer
description: Declutter your workspace with this sleek metallic organizer. A perfect blend of form and function.

name: Gaming Precision Mouse Pad
description: Level up your setup. A large, high-friction surface perfect for precision gaming and custom artwork.

name: Eco-Friendly Canvas Tote
description: Your sustainable daily companion. Heavyweight canvas tote bag, perfect for groceries or a day out.

name: Minimalist Wall Clock
description: Timeless design for any room. A sleek, silent wall clock that can be customized with your own face design.

name: Premium Glass Water Bottle
description: Hydrate in style with our durable borosilicate glass bottle. Features a bamboo lid and silicone sleeve.

name: Cozy Knit Beanie
description: Stay warm with our soft, ribbed knit beanie. Available in multiple colors and ready for custom patches.

name: Handmade Ceramic Coasters
description: Protect your surfaces with style. A set of 4 handmade ceramic coasters with a cork base.

name: Pro Slim Power Bank
description: Charge on the go. 10,000mAh capacity in an ultra-slim metallic body that can be laser-engraved.

name: Illustrated Sticker Pack
description: Personalize anything. A pack of 10 high-quality vinyl stickers with vibrant colors and unique designs.

name: Non-Slip Yoga Mat
description: Your perfect workout partner. High-density, non-slip yoga mat with an etched alignment guide.

name: Custom Enamel Pin
description: Small details, big impact. Collectible enamel pin ready for your unique vector artwork.
